title: prompt-kit chat SurfaceConfig
description: Validates SurfaceConfig.config when SurfaceConfig.vendor='prompt-kit' (the chat-widget vendor used by indemn-runtime-chat). See docs/architecture/deployments.md.

primary_color_ref.description: Token resolving from BrandAssets (e.g., 'brand.primary') OR a literal hex color

show_voice_toggle.description: If true, render a button to switch to a paired voice Deployment

voice_deployment_id.description: If show_voice_toggle=true, the voice Deployment to switch to

minimized_text.description: Text shown on the collapsed widget bubble
